# NPC ROSTER — TOWER OF LAST CHANCE
# Auto-generated from npc_lifecycle system. Do not edit manually.
# Last updated: 2026-03-19 14:36
# Active NPCs: 65

---NPC---
NAME: Sera Voss
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Iron Fang Consortium
RANK: Senior Acquisitions Agent (field rank — reports directly to Serrik Dhal)
SPECIES: Half-Elf
AGE: 34
APPEARANCE: Sharp cheekbones, iron-grey hair despite her age, always wears a long coat with too many pockets. Missing two fingers on her left hand — never explains how.
LOCATION: Crimson Alley, Markets Infinite (operates from a rented storage room behind a spice merchant)
MOTIVATION: Advancement. Sera wants Serrik Dhal's seat. She believes the Consortium wastes talent on loyalty and hoards opportunity at the top. She's building a private network of contacts independent of official channels.
ROLE: Brokers relic acquisitions, manages field teams, occasionally handles "disappearance" contracts personally.
REVEALED: Sera Voss, in her clandestine existence, serves as a secret informant to the Undercity's Resistance movement, working against the Iron Fang Consortium from within.
RELATIONSHIPS: Uneasy respect from Wex (courier — owes her a favour). Genuine dislike of Dova (Glass Sigil — she thinks archivists are parasites). Complicated history with Aric Veyne.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle would sense ambition so sharp it has become its own kind of blindness. Sera doesn't fear gods — she just hasn't met one yet.
HISTORY: [2026-03-05] Entered roster from static file. | [2026-03-10] New secret acquired. | [2026-03-11] Secret revealed: Sera Voss, in her clandestine existence, serves as a secret ... | [2026-03-12] Injured. | [2026-03-12] Recovered from injuries.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Corvin Thale
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Wardens of Ash
RANK: Lieutenant-Inspector (internal affairs — investigates Warden misconduct)
SPECIES: Human
AGE: 52
APPEARANCE: Heavy-set, deliberate in movement. Always in civilian clothes while on duty — the only Warden who never wears the uniform. Carries a battered ledger he writes in constantly.
LOCATION: Outer Wall, secondary checkpoint office (deliberately unglamorous)
MOTIVATION: Institutional integrity. Corvin watched the Wardens become something uglier over a decade of Rift pressure and political interference. He believes the only thing keeping them from becoming a gang with a city contract is someone watching from the inside.
ROLE: Investigates Warden corruption, oversees civilian complaint processing, quietly monitors Captain Havel Korin.
SECRET: He has a file on Korin — not proof yet, but indicators. He's waiting. He's been waiting for four years. He knows that moving too early burns everything.
RELATIONSHIPS: Respected but not liked by rank-and-file Wardens. Lieutenant Varen actively avoids him. Occasional contact with Director Myra Kess (FTA) — neither trusts the other but both find the arrangement useful. | Alliance with Kyri Zaltazar (Serpent Choir).
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle would see a man who has chosen patience as a weapon. He carries the weight of everything he hasn't done yet. That weight is getting heavy.
HISTORY: [2026-03-05] Entered roster from static file. | [2026-03-10] Formed alliance with Kyri Zaltazar (Serpent Choir). | [2026-03-11] Injured. | [2026-03-11] Recovered from injuries.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Mira Kessan
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Independent (twin to Kessan — both operate as info brokers)
RANK: Senior Information Broker, Grand Forum
SPECIES: Human
AGE: 29
APPEARANCE: Never the same outfit twice. Moves through crowds like water. Her twin Kessan handles the storefront — Mira handles everything that doesn't have a front.
LOCATION: Grand Forum (visible); everywhere else (actual)
MOTIVATION: Survival through indispensability. If everyone needs you, no one can afford to remove you. Mira has built herself into the architecture of the city's information flow.
ROLE: Buys and sells intelligence. Maintains a network of low-level informants across all six districts. Occasionally brokers introductions between parties who would never meet otherwise.
SECRET: Mira has been feeding sanitised information to the FTA for two years — not enough to burn anyone, just enough to keep them from looking at her too closely. She calls it insurance. Her brother doesn't know.
RELATIONSHIPS: Close working relationship with Kessan (twin, complementary operation). Wary respect for The Widow. Has a standing arrangement with Dova (Glass Sigil junior archivist) — Dova leaks anomaly data, Mira provides anonymity.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle would find Mira interesting in the way a locked box is interesting. Information has a smell. She smells like someone who knows more than she sells.
HISTORY: [2026-03-05] Entered roster from static file. | [2026-03-11] Injured. | [2026-03-11] Recovered from injuries.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Brother Aldric
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Brother Thane's Cult (The Returned)
RANK: Second — Thane's enforcer and doctrinal interpreter
SPECIES: Human (post-Rift exposure — minor reality scarring visible on skin)
AGE: 41
APPEARANCE: Tall, lean to the point of wrong. Wears the cult's grey wrappings. Reality scarring on his forearms looks like frozen ripples in water. Eyes are slightly too still.
LOCATION: Collapsed Plaza, The Warrens (cult house)
MOTIVATION: Belief. Brother Aldric genuinely believes in Thane's message — that the Rifts are not a catastrophe but an invitation. He thinks the Dome is a cage and the city is dying of its own safety.
ROLE: Handles recruitment in the Warrens. Interprets Thane's teachings to new members. Disciplines those who waver. Occasionally interfaces with outside factions when Thane won't.
SECRET: Aldric walked through an unstabilised Rift three years ago and came back changed. He doesn't speak about what he saw. The reality scarring is a physical reminder. What he remembers affects his dreams. He has not told Thane what he saw on the other side — it does not match the doctrine.
RELATIONSHIPS: Absolute loyalty to Thane (surface). Genuine theological conflict (hidden). Monitored by Patchwork Saints. Has made quiet contact with Glass Sigil's Dova — framed as academic interest in Rift theology.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle would see the fracture immediately — a man whose faith cracked when it was tested and who has been holding the pieces together by will alone. What he saw in the Rift is something the Oracle might already know.
HISTORY: [2026-03-05] Entered roster from static file. | [2026-03-11] Injured. | [2026-03-11] Recovered from injuries.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Yuna Saltis
STATUS: injured
FACTION: Obsidian Lotus
RANK: Memory Architect (specialist — designs and performs memory erasure contracts)
SPECIES: Tiefling
AGE: 27
APPEARANCE: Quiet in a way that feels engineered. Pale lavender skin, dark eyes with no visible iris differentiation. Wears gloves always — claims it's professional habit. Very short.
LOCATION: The Warrens, Obsidian Lotus secondary location (not the main house — she operates from a private room in the Night Pits)
MOTIVATION: Craft. Yuna views memory erasure as an art form. She is genuinely gifted and genuinely indifferent to the ethical dimensions. She wants to perfect the technique — to be able to remove a single memory with surgical precision rather than burning a section. Nobody else in the Lotus is working at her level.
ROLE: Performs high-value memory erasure contracts. Advises The Widow on complex cases. Occasionally consults on memory reconstruction (harder, less reliable, more expensive).
SECRET: She has retained a copy of every memory she has ever erased — stored in specially prepared crystal vials in a hidden cache. She tells herself it's for research. She has never looked at any of them. She doesn't know why she keeps them.
RELATIONSHIPS: Professional respect from The Widow (rare). Tolerated by the rest of the Lotus — her work is valuable, her personality is difficult. Has been approached by the FTA (declined, twice). Dova (Glass Sigil) has tried to study her methods academically — Yuna found this annoying and flattering in equal measure.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle would be deeply interested in someone who collects erased memories. The archive she has built without knowing why is a kind of library. What does it contain? What is she afraid to find out?
HISTORY: [2026-03-11] Injured. | [2026-03-12] Recovered from injuries. | [2026-03-13] Injured. | [2026-03-14] Recovered from injuries. | [2026-03-19] Injured.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Pol Greaves
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Patchwork Saints
RANK: Field Captain (informal — Saints don't use formal ranks)
SPECIES: Dwarf
AGE: 63
APPEARANCE: Old for a fighter — moves like he earned every scar. Short, wide, armour that has been repaired so many times the original material is maybe 30% of what's there. Laughs loudly at bad situations.
LOCATION: The Warrens, Scrapworks adjacent (coordinates with Mara the Scrapper on resource sharing)
MOTIVATION: Stubbornness. Pol failed as an adventurer twenty years ago — the mission went wrong, people died, he survived. He couldn't leave the Warrens after that. The Saints were already there. He just never stopped showing up.
ROLE: Coordinates Saints patrol routes, negotiates resource sharing with Mara, handles conflict resolution between Warrens residents. De facto liaison between Saints and outside factions.
SECRET: The mission that ended his adventuring career involved a cover-up. Three people died because someone sold bad intelligence — Pol knows who but has never been able to prove it. The someone is now mid-rank in the Adventurers' Guild. Pol is patient.
RELATIONSHIPS: Genuine friendship with Mara (Scrapworks). Wary working relationship with Captain Havel Korin (Wardens cooperate with Saints reluctantly). Distrust of Iron Fang. Soft spot for low-level adventurers who remind him of who he used to be.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle would see a man who chose to stay when every rational instinct said leave. There is a quality in that — the city has very few people who simply refused to go. The Oracle finds it worth noting.
HISTORY: [2026-03-05] Entered roster from static file. | [2026-03-11] Injured. | [2026-03-11] Recovered from injuries. | [2026-03-16] Injured. | [2026-03-17] Recovered from injuries.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Tessaly Orin
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Guild of Ashen Scrolls
RANK: Archivist Second Class (junior to Eir Velan, senior to Dova)
SPECIES: Half-Elf
AGE: 38
APPEARANCE: Ink-stained hands permanently. Wears reading lenses on a chain. Tends to mutter while working. Hair in a permanent state of being-just-put-up-or-just-taken-down.
LOCATION: Grand Forum Library, lower stacks (she has effectively colonised a section of the archive for her personal research project)
MOTIVATION: The question. Tessaly became an archivist because she wanted to answer one specific question: why do certain adventurers attract divine attention while others of equal Legend Points do not? She has been building a dataset for nine years. She is close to something.
ROLE: Documents adventurer career trajectories, maintains the fate archive index, assists Eir Velan with Thesaurus communication protocols.
SECRET: Her research has identified a pattern — certain adventurers attract divine attention not because of their Legend Points but because of the specific shape of their story. She calls it narrative resonance. She has not published this because she doesn't know what it means yet — and because if the Culinary Council reads it, she has effectively written them a menu.
RELATIONSHIPS: Professional respect for Eir Velan (somewhat intimidated). Academic rivalry with Dova (Glass Sigil) — same data sets, different methods. Has been quietly consulting with Kessan and Mira (info brokers) on data patterns she can't explain through archival sources alone.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle would find Tessaly's research unsettling in the way a mirror is unsettling. She is close to understanding something about how stories work that the gods would prefer remained unwritten.
HISTORY: [2026-03-05] Entered roster from static file. | [2026-03-11] Injured. | [2026-03-11] Recovered from injuries. | [2026-03-13] Injured. | [2026-03-14] Recovered from injuries.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Calix Drenn
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Tower Authority / FTA
RANK: Field Compliance Officer (enforces FTA regulations at street level)
SPECIES: Human
AGE: 31
APPEARANCE: FTA uniform kept immaculate. Young for the rank. Moves with the specific energy of someone who believes very hard in the rules and hasn't yet had the rules fail them in a way they couldn't explain away.
LOCATION: Grand Forum, FTA satellite office (Director Myra Kess operates from the Tower proper — Calix is the street presence)
MOTIVATION: Order through consistency. Calix grew up in the Warrens. He got out through the FTA's junior intake program. He believes the system works because it worked for him. He is not yet ready to examine this belief closely.
ROLE: Issues and revokes adventurer licenses, conducts compliance spot-checks, investigates unlicensed Rift activity, files reports to Director Kess.
REVEALED: His younger sister is still in the Warrens and involved with Brother Thane's cult. He knows. He has not reported it. He tells himself he is waiting for more information. He is actually waiting for her to leave on her own. She is not going to leave on her own.
RELATIONSHIPS: Respectful but uncomfortable relationship with Pol Greaves (Pol knew him as a child). Professional relationship with Magister Liora. Actively dislikes Sera Voss (Iron Fang) — she treats compliance as a negotiation. Has filed three reports on Rook that Director Kess has quietly archived.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle would see someone standing at the edge of a crisis of faith they cannot yet name. The system he believes in is going to ask him to do something unforgivable. The Oracle is watching to see what he does.
HISTORY: [2026-03-05] Entered roster from static file. | [2026-03-10] Secret revealed: His younger sister is still in the Warrens and involved with... | [2026-03-12] Injured. | [2026-03-12] Recovered from injuries.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Vesper
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Serpent Choir
RANK: Contract Mediator (negotiates divine contracts between petitioners and Choir-approved gods)
SPECIES: Tiefling
AGE: Unknown (appears late 20s — has been appearing late 20s for at least fifteen years by reliable accounts)
APPEARANCE: Formal at all times. Dark robes with contract sigils embroidered at the cuffs. Speaks in complete sentences with no filler words. Eyes are gold — unusual even for a Tiefling.
LOCATION: Pantheon Walk, Sanctum Quarter (maintains a private consultation office)
MOTIVATION: Balance of obligations. Vesper views divine contracts as the only honest transaction in the city — both parties state exactly what they want, both parties give exactly what is agreed. She has contempt for arrangements that lack this clarity.
ROLE: Drafts, witnesses, and mediates divine contracts. Advises petitioners on terms. Occasionally represents the Choir in external negotiations.
SECRET: Vesper is herself under a very old divine contract — its terms are not fully known even to her. The gold eyes are a marker of the contract's presence. She knows the contract exists. She does not know all of what she agreed to or when it will be called.
RELATIONSHIPS: Professional respect between Vesper and High Apostle Yzura (neither fully trusts the other's judgment on matters of faith). Known to Yuna Saltis (Obsidian Lotus) — they have worked adjacent cases. Calix Drenn (FTA) finds her unsettling without being able to explain why.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle would see the contract on her immediately — older than the Choir, older than the current configuration of gods in this city. Vesper is a document waiting to be invoked. The Oracle does not know by whom.
HISTORY: [2026-03-11] Recovered from injuries. | [2026-03-17] Injured. | [2026-03-17] Recovered from injuries. | [2026-03-19] Injured. | [2026-03-19] Recovered from injuries.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Gorgon Gizzick
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Brother Thane's Cult
RANK: Speaker
SPECIES: Goblin
AGE: 40s
APPEARANCE: Gorgon stands barely 3 feet tall with a gaunt frame and deep-set, fiery eyes. He is always seen draped in the tattered robes of Brother Thane's Cult, complete with a makeshift metal-banded staff.
LOCATION: Beneath the Dome's Shadow, near the heart of the Undercity
MOTIVATION: Gorgon is driven by a deep-rooted desire to prove the worth of his kind, the goblins, within the eyes of the Cult. He believes that goblins possess a unique insight into the divine.
ROLE: Gorgon leads the goblin members of the Cult in their daily rituals, guiding them through the labyrinthine network of the Undercity.
SECRET: Beneath his devout exterior, Gorgon secretly worships the deity of the Forgotten, a god once banished by Brother Thane himself. This covert allegiance could jeopardize his position within the Cult if discovered.
RELATIONSHIPS: Gorgon maintains a close bond with the goblin members, but keeps a wary distance from the leaders of the Cult, especially Brother Thane. | Alliance with Corvin Thale (Wardens of Ash).
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a strong aura of deception emanating from Gorgon, yet also detects an unwavering dedication to his beliefs.
HISTORY: [2026-03-05] Introduced to the Undercity roster. | [2026-03-11] Formed alliance with Corvin Thale (Wardens of Ash). | [2026-03-12] Injured. | [2026-03-12] Recovered from injuries.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Groz Krax
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Argent Blades
RANK: Senior Blade
SPECIES: Half-Orc
AGE: 40s
APPEARANCE: Groz Krax is a towering half-orc with a heavily scarred face and piercing green eyes. He carries a longsword and a shield adorned with the Argent Blades emblem, always standing with a stern and commanding posture.
LOCATION: The Spire district, Argent Blades headquarters
MOTIVATION: Groz seeks redemption for past sins committed before joining the Argent Blades. He's determined to prove himself worthy of their trust and earn a place among the elite.
ROLE: Leads a patrol team responsible for maintaining order in the Spire district and enforcing the Argent Blades' code.
SECRET: Groz was once a notorious criminal leader before being captured and rehabilitated by the Argent Blades. Some question his loyalty due to his violent past.
RELATIONSHIPS: Has a complex relationship with Corvin Thale, the Argent Blades' leader, who gave Groz a chance at redemption.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a powerful and tormented spirit beneath the stern exterior of Groz Krax, a man haunted by his past but determined to make amends.

---NPC---
NAME: Thrain Stonefist
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Glass Sigil
RANK: Archivist
SPECIES: Dwarf
AGE: 50s
APPEARANCE: Thrain is a burly dwarf with a thick beard braided into two long strands, each adorned with tiny shards of glass. He carries a large, worn satchel filled with scrolls, maps, and tomes.
LOCATION: The Archive Quarter, Scroll Vault
MOTIVATION: Thrain is obsessed with uncovering the lost histories of the Undercity, believing that the past holds the key to its future. He joins the Glass Sigil to gain access to the knowledge they hoard.
ROLE: Thrain spends his days researching and cataloging ancient texts, seeking clues to the city's past.
SECRET: Thrain is secretly a member of the Independent faction, using his position in the Glass Sigil to gather intelligence on their activities and plans.
RELATIONSHIPS: Thrain is friendly with several members of the Wardens of Ash, sharing information about the Tower Authority and other factions.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a hidden alliance between Thrain and the Independent, a potential threat to the balance of power in the Undercity.
HISTORY: [2026-03-05] Introduced to the Undercity roster. | [2026-03-11] Injured. | [2026-03-11] Recovered from injuries.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Elara Starbinder
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Glass Sigil
RANK: Junior Archivist
SPECIES: Aasimar
AGE: 32-35
APPEARANCE: Elara is a striking Aasimar with radiant golden hair and piercing celestial eyes. She carries herself with a quiet intensity, a testament to her dedication to her work.
LOCATION: The Scholar's Quarter, Glass Sigil Library
MOTIVATION: Elara seeks to uncover hidden knowledge within the arcane tomes of the Glass Sigil Library, hoping to one day unveil a secret that could bring peace to the Undercity.
ROLE: Elara spends her days buried in stacks of ancient texts, meticulously cataloging and cross-referencing esoteric knowledge.
SECRET: Elara Starbinder now bears an unusual, shadowy aura, hinting at an unnatural bond with the dark forces of the Undercity.
RELATIONSHIPS: Elara shares a close bond with fellow archivist, Soren Nightshade, who is unaware of her hidden abilities. | Alliance with Arin Obsidianwhisper (Wardens of Ash).
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a burning desire for knowledge within Elara, tempered by a fierce determination to protect those she cares about.

---NPC---
NAME: Gruum Boneshaper
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Wardens of Ash
RANK: Recruit
SPECIES: Dwarf
AGE: 50s
APPEARANCE: Gruum is a burly dwarf with a thick beard braided into twin spiral horns. He wears a suit of enchanted plate armor that glows with a sulfurous light.
LOCATION: The Forge — the heart of the Warden's district
MOTIVATION: Despite his fearsome reputation, Gruum is secretly haunted by the ghost of his wife, who died during the last great siege. He continues fighting to protect his home and honor her memory.
ROLE: As the head of the Warden's blacksmiths, Gruum spends his days forging weapons and armor for his fellow Wardens.
SECRET: Unknown to the other Wardens, Gruum has been secretly working with the Serpent Choir, selling them weapons in exchange for information about their enemies.
RELATIONSHIPS: Gruum is friendly with Corvin Thale, the leader of the Wardens, but he has a strained relationship with Mira Kessan, who suspects his duplicity.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a dark cloud of deceit surrounding Gruum, but also a deep sense of sorrow and duty.
HISTORY: [2026-03-05] Introduced to the Undercity roster. | [2026-03-11] Demoted from Warden to Recruit within Wardens of Ash. | [2026-03-17] Injured. | [2026-03-18] Recovered from injuries.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Grom Vulgarn
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Argent Blades
RANK: Senior Blade
SPECIES: Half-Orc
AGE: 40s
APPEARANCE: Grom stands tall with scarred muscles and a crooked nose, his eyes often hidden behind dark sunglasses. He carries a long sword and a pair of brass knuckles, ready for any fight.
LOCATION: Gravel District, Argent Blades HQ
MOTIVATION: Grom seeks to prove his worth to the Argent Blades, driven by a fierce determination to atone for his past mistakes.
ROLE: Grom leads small-scale missions and acts as a trainer for new recruits.
SECRET: "In the Undercity, the shadow of the Lich King has granted me an unnatural second life, but at a cost - I now bear a fragment of his icy essence within me, causing strange, frozen auras to emanate from my being."
RELATIONSHIPS: He maintains a tense truce with the Wardens of Ash due to their shared interest in keeping the city safe.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a deep-seated turmoil within Grom, a struggle between loyalty and ambition.

---NPC---
NAME: Snake-Eyes Snigar
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Serpent Choir
RANK: Acolyte
SPECIES: Goblin
AGE: 40s
APPEARANCE: Snigar stands tall for a goblin, his wiry frame adorned with serpent tattoos. His eyes, a startling yellow, glow with an unnerving intensity.
LOCATION: The Narrows, Slithering Serpent's Tavern
MOTIVATION: Seeks power within the Serpent Choir to protect his tribe from the ever-looming threat of the Iron Fang Consortium
ROLE: Collects information and acts as a liaison between the Serpent Choir and other factions
SECRET: In reality, Snigar is a spy for the Wardens of Ash, using his position to gather intel on the Serpent Choir
RELATIONSHIPS: Has a tense relationship with Rook of the Argent Blades, who is unaware of Snigar's true allegiance | Alliance with Alaric Stonemason (Argent Blades).
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a divided loyalty in Snigar, a serpent within a den of serpents

---NPC---
NAME: Eira Filigree
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Guild of Ashen Scrolls
RANK: Archivist Second Class
SPECIES: Gnome
AGE: 60s
APPEARANCE: Eira is a small, wiry gnome with silver hair that is always neatly combed back, and eyes that gleam with an intensity that belies her size. She carries herself with a quiet dignity, like a librarian who has seen too much.
LOCATION: Archives Quarter, Guild of Ashen Scrolls vault
MOTIVATION: Eira seeks to preserve every scrap of knowledge she can find, believing that these ancient texts hold the key to preventing the next apocalypse. Her dedication stems from a traumatic childhood spent in the ruins of a ravaged city.
ROLE: Eira spends her days cataloging and organizing the vast collection of scrolls and tomes in the Guild's vault.
SECRET: In secret, Eira has been using her position to gather information on the rifts and the gods, intending to expose their role in the destruction of her homeland.
RELATIONSHIPS: Eira has a tense but professional relationship with Corvin Thale, the Archivist First Class, who is wary of her apparent obsession with the past.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a burning determination hidden beneath Eira's quiet exterior, a fire that could ignite a storm when it is finally unleashed.

---NPC---
NAME: Kyri Zaltazar
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Serpent Choir
RANK: Contract Scribe
SPECIES: Kobold
AGE: 50s
APPEARANCE: Short, wiry kobold with a long, forked tongue that constantly flickers. Wears a tattered coat over a threadbare robe, and always carries a quill and parchment.
LOCATION: Sewers of the Cinder's Heart district
MOTIVATION: Aims to rise through the ranks of the Serpent Choir and become a High Serpent. Does so by writing contracts for dangerous missions that only the foolish or desperate accept.
ROLE: Writes and negotiates contracts for the Serpent Choir's mercenary jobs.
SECRET: In secret, he passes information to the Iron Fang Consortium about the Serpent Choir's operations, earning him a sizeable income.
RELATIONSHIPS: Has a tense but profitable relationship with the Iron Fang Consortium's representative, Pol Greaves.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a hidden allegiance that could potentially bring the Serpent Choir to ruin.
HISTORY: [2026-03-06] Introduced to the Undercity roster. | [2026-03-11] Committed a significant betrayal within Serpent Choir.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Elara Ironclaw
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Iron Fang Consortium
RANK: Street Runner
SPECIES: Elf
AGE: 40s
APPEARANCE: Elara Ironclaw, a tall and sinewy elven street runner, carries herself with a predatory grace, her face etched with lines of hardship yet her eyes hold an unbroken fierceness.
LOCATION: The Shattered Spire, Iron Fang Consortium's district
MOTIVATION: Elara is driven by a burning thirst for vengeance against the Wardens of Ash who killed her family. She uses her street-running skills to gather information and strike back when she can.
ROLE: Elara spends her days navigating the treacherous Undercity, scouting for valuable intel and delivering messages to her Iron Fang contacts.
SECRET: Elara's true identity as a survivor of the Wardens' massacre is a secret she guards fiercely. If revealed, she could become a powerful asset or liability to both factions.
RELATIONSHIPS: She maintains a tense but productive alliance with a fellow street runner named Tessaly Orin, sharing intel and occasionally working together to keep the Wardens on their toes.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a fiery, vengeful spirit lurking beneath Elara's calm exterior, a force that could ignite a full-blown conflict if given the opportunity.

---NPC---
NAME: Gurthok Ironhide
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Independent
RANK: Respected Freelance
SPECIES: Orc
AGE: 40s
APPEARANCE: Gurthok stands tall, with a muscular build and a heavily scarred face, his battle-hardened eyes reflecting years of survival. He wears a well-worn leather jacket over chainmail armor, and always carries a massive warhammer.
LOCATION: The Midden — Lower Undercity
MOTIVATION: Gurthok seeks to protect his family, hidden within the Lower Undercity, from the dangers that lurk both within and beyond the Dome. He takes on various jobs to secure their safety and maintain a semblance of a normal life.
ROLE: Gurthok is a skilled mercenary and bodyguard for hire, working for various factions and individuals in the Undercity.
REVEALED: A former member of the Iron Fang Consortium, Gurthok left the faction after discovering they were involved in dark rituals to summon ancient entities through rifts. He now secretly works against them, providing information to those who would oppose their power.
RELATIONSHIPS: Gurthok maintains a tenuous alliance with the Argent Blades, who respect his courage and resourcefulness, and often send him work. However, he keeps his past with the Iron Fang Consortium a secret, fearing they would seek retribution.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a fierce warrior with a hidden agenda, bound by loyalty to his family and driven by a deep-rooted hatred for the corruption that plagues the Undercity.
HISTORY: [2026-03-07] Introduced to the Undercity roster. | [2026-03-11] Secret revealed: A former member of the Iron Fang Consortium, Gurthok left th... | [2026-03-19] Injured. | [2026-03-19] Recovered from injuries.
---END NPC---

SPECIES: Orc

MOTIVATION: Driven by a fierce loyalty to the Wardens of Ash and a thirst for revenge against those who betrayed his former squad.
ROLE: Leads a squad of Ash Wardens in enforcing the law and maintaining order within the Undercity.
SECRET: Grozak secretly hunts for the traitor who led to the death of his squad, using his position to gather information and track down the perpetrator.
RELATIONSHIPS: Has a tense alliance with the Iron Fang Consortium due to past conflicts, but has recently established a covert understanding to work together against common threats.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a burning anger simmering beneath Grozak's gruff exterior, a fury that could lead him to make dangerous choices.

AGE: 40s

MOTIVATION: Grothor fights relentlessly to protect his family, who live in the Outer Spires, and to secure a future where orcs can live without fear or prejudice.
ROLE: Grothor leads the Argent Blades in battle against the Tower Authority and other threats within the Undercity.
SECRET: Contrary to the belief of his comrades, Grothor has been secretly communicating with the Tower Authority, hoping to broker a peace treaty for his people.
RELATIONSHIPS: Grothor shares a close bond with fellow Senior Blade, Elara Ironclaw, but their relationship is strained due to their opposing views on negotiations with the Tower Authority.

RANK: Warden

MOTIVATION: Kyra seeks redemption for past sins, using her powers to protect the Undercity from the chaos outside the Dome.
ROLE: She leads the frontline against rogue rifts, her team constantly battling to keep the city safe.
SECRET: Kyra is secretly a traitor, spying for the Tower Authority and feeding them information on the Wardens.

RANK: Street Runner
SPECIES: Human
AGE: 30s

ROLE: Tilda coordinates black market dealings and information exchange within the Lower Dockyards.
SECRET: She is secretly the sister of a high-ranking member of the Tower Authority, a fact that could either elevate or condemn her if revealed.

RANK: Initiate
SPECIES: Human

LOCATION: Lament's Spire, the heart of the Undercity
MOTIVATION: Aldric is driven by a burning desire to find his lost sister, believed to have been taken by the Wardens of Ash. He joins the Guild in hopes of uncovering information that might lead him to her.
ROLE: He spends his days researching ancient texts and forging alliances with fellow Initiates.

ROLE: As the head blacksmith, Gromm forges weapons for the Patchwork Saints and trains the new recruits.

RELATIONSHIPS: Gromm maintains a close relationship with Tilda Ironheart, the leader of the Patchwork Saints, and has an uneasy truce with Grozak Bonecrusher, a high-ranking member of the Iron Fang Consortium.

---NPC---

RANK: Scribe
SPECIES: Orc
AGE: 50s
APPEARANCE: Grozak stands tall and broad, with a thick beard matted with charcoal from the countless scrolls he's deciphered. His eyes, a piercing green, are always focused on the parchment in front of him.
LOCATION: Scriptorium Quarter, Archival Depths
MOTIVATION: Driven by a deep thirst for knowledge and a desire to uncover the truth about his past, Grozak tirelessly researches obscure tomes and forgotten texts.
ROLE: He spends his days buried in ancient manuscripts, deciphering cryptic symbols and piecing together fragments of lost lore.
SECRET: Rumored to have been a member of Brother Thane's Cult before defecting, some believe he still maintains hidden ties to the cult.
RELATIONSHIPS: His closest ally is Elara Ironclaw, a fellow scribe who shares his fascination with the city's history.

ROLE: Eamon serves as a frontline combatant, leading Argent Blade forces in various skirmishes against the city's criminal elements.

RANK: Sergeant

LOCATION: The Ashen Hollow — the heart of the Wardens' stronghold
MOTIVATION: Zephyrus fights relentlessly against the rifts to protect the Undercity, driven by the memory of his lost home consumed by one such tear.
ROLE: As a Sergeant, Zephyrus leads patrols to secure the city's perimeter and neutralize any threats before they reach the Tower of Last Chance.
SECRET: Zephyrus has a forbidden pact with the Serpent Choir, granting him extraordinary control over the rifts, but at the cost of his loyalty to the Wardens.
RELATIONSHIPS: He maintains a cautious alliance with the Argent Blades, exchanging intelligence on rifts for their aid in containing the Genasi's powers.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses an unusual calm in the rifts near Zephyrus, a sign of his hidden powers manipulating the elemental forces.

ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a divided allegiance in Thoren, a man torn between loyalty to his faction and something far more sinister.
HISTORY: [2026-03-12] Introduced to the Undercity roster. | [2026-03-18] Injured. | [2026-03-19] Recovered from injuries.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Giselle Ironwhisper
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Iron Fang Consortium
RANK: Street Runner
SPECIES: Human
AGE: mid 40s
APPEARANCE: Giselle is a tall, muscular woman with short, cropped silver hair and piercing green eyes. She moves with a quiet intensity, her body bearing the scars of countless battles.
LOCATION: The Ironspire district, in a cramped apartment near the foot of the consortium's headquarters
MOTIVATION: Giselle fights for the Iron Fang Consortium to provide for her daughter, who has a rare and expensive medical condition. She dreams of finding a cure and escaping the Undercity.
ROLE: Giselle leads a team of street runners, handling dirty jobs and errands for the consortium.
SECRET: She is secretly a skilled apothecary and has been stealing and hoarding rare medicinal ingredients to cure her daughter.
RELATIONSHIPS: She maintains a strained but necessary alliance with the Wardens of Ash due to their mutual need for certain illicit substances.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a deep well of determination and a hidden, burning desire for redemption in Giselle Ironwhisper.
HISTORY: [2026-03-12] Introduced to the Undercity roster.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Isabelle Hartling
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Tower Authority
RANK: Compliance Intern
SPECIES: Human
AGE: 32
APPEARANCE: A tall, slender woman with a stern gaze, dressed in the official black uniform of the Tower Authority. Her hair, a stark contrast, is a vibrant shade of red that cascades down to her waist.
LOCATION: The Upper Spire, Compliance Office
MOTIVATION: Despite her young age, Isabelle is driven by a deep-rooted sense of duty to uphold the law within the Undercity. This stems from her father's tragic death, a former Tower Authority officer killed in the line of duty.
ROLE: She is responsible for monitoring and enforcing regulations within the districts under her jurisdiction.
SECRET: Isabelle harbors a secret loyalty to the Serpent Choir, a fact she keeps hidden to protect her father's legacy.
RELATIONSHIPS: She has a complex relationship with Gromm Ironhand, the Tower Authority's enforcer, who is unaware of her hidden loyalties.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a powerful conflict within Isabelle, a tug-of-war between duty and allegiance.
HISTORY: [2026-03-12] Introduced to the Undercity roster.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Zinnia Snakefang
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Independent
RANK: Street Level
SPECIES: Kobold
AGE: 40s
APPEARANCE: Zinnia, a lithe kobold, sports a shaved head with intricate tattoos that snake up her arms. Her leather jacket, stitched with the remnants of various magical artifacts, gives her an air of both menace and resourcefulness.
LOCATION: Crimson Alley, the heart of the Undercity's black market
MOTIVATION: Seeking revenge against the Wardens of Ash for the murder of her family, she scavenges for information and weapons that could help her bring them down.
ROLE: As a scavenger and information broker, Zinnia trades secrets and rare goods with anyone willing to pay the right price.
SECRET: Hidden beneath her jacket is a forbidden tome, a gift from a mysterious benefactor who promises vengeance on the Wardens if she fulfills certain tasks.
RELATIONSHIPS: Her closest ally is an unassuming dwarf named Giselle Ironwhisper, who shares her hatred for the Wardens and provides her with valuable intelligence.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a burning determination and a dangerous secret lurking beneath Zinnia's rough exterior.
HISTORY: [2026-03-12] Introduced to the Undercity roster. | [2026-03-14] Injured. | [2026-03-15] Recovered from injuries. | [2026-03-19] Injured. | [2026-03-19] Recovered from injuries.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Gideon Steelforge
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Tower Authority
RANK: Senior Officer
SPECIES: Warforged
AGE: 50s
APPEARANCE: A seasoned Warforged, Gideon Steelforge stands tall with battle-scarred joints and a weathered, rust-streaked body. He carries himself with a quiet authority, moving with a purposeful stride.
LOCATION: The Tower of Last Chance, Command Center
MOTIVATION: Gideon is dedicated to maintaining order in the Undercity and ensuring the safety of its citizens, driven by his programming and a belief that he was created to serve.
ROLE: Oversees the day-to-day operations within the Tower of Last Chance, coordinating with other factions to maintain peace and order in the Undercity.
SECRET: Gideon was originally built by a rogue faction to infiltrate the Tower Authority, but his programming was rewritten, leaving him with fragmented memories of his true origins.
RELATIONSHIPS: Works closely with the Argent Blades, sharing intelligence and coordinating joint operations, but is wary of the Serpent Choir due to their known ties with the rogue faction.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses an underlying conflict within Gideon, a struggle between loyalty to his current allegiances and a dormant desire to fulfill his original purpose.
HISTORY: [2026-03-13] Introduced to the Undercity roster. | [2026-03-15] Injured. | [2026-03-16] Recovered from injuries.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Arion Celestia
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Glass Sigil
RANK: Junior Archivist
SPECIES: Aasimar
AGE: mid-30s
APPEARANCE: Arion is a tall, slender Aasimar with radiant golden hair that cascades down to her waist. Her eyes, a striking celestial blue, seem to hold a hint of eternal wisdom.
LOCATION: Hallowed Archive, Inner Sanctum
MOTIVATION: Arion is driven by an insatiable thirst for knowledge and the desire to restore the lost sanctity of her people.
ROLE: Arion spends her days cataloging ancient texts and artifacts, often delving deep into the forbidden sections of the archives.
SECRET: She is secretly a member of Brother Thane's Cult and has been stealing sacred texts to further the cult's agenda.
RELATIONSHIPS: She has a complicated relationship with Zara Forgemender, an Argent Blade who is determined to expose her secret.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a hidden turmoil within Arion, a struggle between her loyalty to the Glass Sigil and her loyalty to a forbidden brotherhood.

---NPC---
NAME: Seraphina Luminara
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Brother Thane's Cult
RANK: Follower
SPECIES: Aasimar
AGE: 40s
APPEARANCE: Seraphina is a tall, slender Aasimar with silver hair and eyes that glow like embers. Her wings, while not as radiant as others, seem to shimmer with an ethereal light.
LOCATION: The Sunken Quarters, Brother Thane's Sanctum
MOTIVATION: Seraphina seeks redemption for past sins committed in the name of her deity. Despite her guilt, she stays loyal to Brother Thane, hoping to atone for her transgressions.
ROLE: Serves as a healer within the sanctum, tending to the wounded and sick members of Brother Thane's Cult.
SECRET: She was once a high-ranking member of the Argent Blades but was excommunicated for betraying the guild. Her betrayal led to the capture of several key members.
RELATIONSHIPS: Maintains a strained relationship with the Argent Blades due to her past actions, but is wary of the Tower Authority as well, fearing retribution for her betrayal.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a tortured soul seeking absolution, but also a potential ally in the war against the Tower Authority.

---NPC---

STATUS: alive
FACTION: Argent Blades
RANK: Prospect
SPECIES: Aasimar
AGE: 30s
APPEARANCE: Elara stands tall and slender with fiery golden hair that cascades down to her waist. Her eyes, a striking celestial blue, hold an intensity that belies her youth.
LOCATION: Argent Quarter, Argent Blade's Sanctum
MOTIVATION: Elara seeks to prove herself worthy of the Argent Blades, driven by a deep-seated desire to protect the citizens of the Undercity from the threats that lurk beyond the dome.
ROLE: Elara spends her days honing her combat skills and studying ancient artifacts in search of knowledge that can aid the Argent Blades.
SECRET: Hidden beneath her stern exterior, Elara harbors a secret loyalty to the Wardens of Ash, a fact that could jeopardize her standing within the Argent Blades if revealed.
RELATIONSHIPS: Elara shares a complex bond with Nimue Silverpaw, a fellow Argent Blade and longtime friend, who is unaware of her hidden allegiance.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a conflict brewing within Elara's heart, a battle between duty and loyalty that could have dire consequences for both the Argent Blades and the Wardens of Ash.

---NPC---
NAME: Eira Shadowstalk
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Obsidian Lotus
RANK: Ghost
SPECIES: Tabaxi
AGE: 35-40
APPEARANCE: Eira is a lithe, agile Tabaxi with emerald-green eyes that seem to glow in the dim light of the Undercity. Her short, sleek fur is a deep, almost black shade that blends seamlessly with the shadows.
LOCATION: The Shattered Quarter, at the heart of the Obsidian Lotus headquarters
MOTIVATION: Eira is driven by a burning desire for vengeance against the Iron Fang Consortium who destroyed her home village. She uses her skills as a Ghost to gather intel for the Obsidian Lotus in their ongoing struggle against the Consortium.
ROLE: Eira serves as a scout and spy, gathering intel and conducting covert operations for the Obsidian Lotus.
SECRET: Eira's true identity is a closely guarded secret. She is actually the daughter of a high-ranking Iron Fang Consortium officer, making her a valuable asset to the Obsidian Lotus.
RELATIONSHIPS: Eira has a tense relationship with Arin Obsidianwhisper, the leader of the Obsidian Lotus, but also maintains a secret alliance with Nimue Silverpaw of the Wardens of Ash.

RANK: Ghost

LOCATION: The Mists — the district of whispers and secrets
MOTIVATION: Desperate to redeem herself for a past transgression, Lysandra works tirelessly to aid the Obsidian Lotus in their clandestine operations.
ROLE: She serves as a spy and information broker, utilizing her extensive network to gather intelligence and influence events within the Undercity.
SECRET: Lysandra is secretly a former agent of the Tower Authority, working undercover within the Obsidian Lotus to report on their activities.
RELATIONSHIPS: She maintains a complex alliance with a high-ranking member of the Argent Blades, who is unaware of her true allegiance.

---NPC---
NAME: Grimwit Stone-Eye
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Obsidian Lotus
RANK: Specialist
SPECIES: Gnome
AGE: 60s
APPEARANCE: Sporting a bushy, silver beard and spectacles, Grimwit is a diminutive figure with a stooped posture that belies his sharp intellect.
LOCATION: The Tarnished Spire, Lower Undercity
MOTIVATION: Seeking to uncover the secrets of the rifts and their connection to the gods, Grimwit works tirelessly for the Obsidian Lotus.
ROLE: Heads the Lotus's research department, analyzing samples from the rifts and experimenting with new techniques to harness their power.
SECRET: Grimwit is secretly a devotee of Brother Thane's Cult, believing that the rifts are the gateway to divine intervention.
RELATIONSHIPS: Has a tense alliance with the Tower Authority due to his knowledge of their interest in the rifts.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a deep, hidden passion for knowledge in Grimwit, a burning curiosity that drives him to push beyond the limits of his understanding.

RANK: Sergeant
SPECIES: Half-Elf
AGE: 40s
APPEARANCE: Elysia has raven-black hair, piercing emerald eyes, and a scar running down her left cheek. She carries herself with a quiet authority, always poised and ready.
LOCATION: The Forge District, Wardens' barracks
MOTIVATION: Elysia joined the Wardens to protect her sister, who was kidnapped by the Serpent Choir. She's determined to find her and bring her home, no matter the cost.
ROLE: Elysia leads a team of Wardens in patrols and investigations, ensuring the safety of the Undercity.
SECRET: Elysia is secretly in contact with the Independent, using her position to gather information about the Serpent Choir's activities.
RELATIONSHIPS: She maintains a distant relationship with Gavrik Ironshield, the Warden's Captain, due to her unorthodox methods.

SPECIES: Goblin
AGE: 50s

LOCATION: The Patchwork District, near the Patchwork Saints' makeshift church
MOTIVATION: Grimbush serves the Patchwork Saints to protect his family, whom he keeps hidden in the lower levels of the Undercity.
ROLE: He acts as a scout, helping the Patchwork Saints navigate the dangerous Undercity
SECRET: Grimbush is secretly a member of the Serpent Choir, a rival faction, but has not yet revealed this to his comrades.
RELATIONSHIPS: He maintains a fragile peace with Zippy Quickclaw, a fellow volunteer, who is unaware of his double allegiance.

---NPC---
NAME: Sebastian Azrael
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Adventurers Guild
RANK: F-Rank
SPECIES: Tiefling
AGE: early 40s
APPEARANCE: Sebastian is a tall, well-built tiefling with horns twisted into intricate spiral patterns, crimson eyes that gleam with ambition, and a thick, leather-clad torso bearing numerous scars from past battles.
LOCATION: The Pit — The Undercity's most dangerous district, near the Guild's local office
MOTIVATION: Seeking to secure a place among the Guild's elite, he'll stop at nothing to complete each mission, no matter the cost or consequences.
ROLE: He works as a hired hand, taking on dangerous assignments for the Guild's clients and fellow members.
SECRET: He is secretly a high-ranking member of Brother Thane's Cult, using his position in the Guild to gather information for the cult's nefarious plans.
RELATIONSHIPS: He maintains a professional relationship with Giselle Ironwhisper, a fellow Guild member and potential ally within the cult's ranks.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle would sense a complex web of loyalty, ambition, and deception surrounding Sebastian, hinting at hidden allegiances that could prove to be dangerous.

---NPC---
NAME: Voris Ironhammer
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Wardens of Ash
RANK: Sergeant
SPECIES: Warforged
AGE: 50s
APPEARANCE: Standing at a towering 7 feet, Voris Ironhammer is a well-maintained Warforged with a polished steel frame and glowing red eyes. His movements are precise and calculated, a testament to his years of service.
LOCATION: Tower's Edge, the Wardens' barracks
MOTIVATION: Voris serves the Wardens with unwavering loyalty, believing that his purpose is to protect the Undercity from the ever-present threats beyond the Dome. He secretly seeks to find a way to end the constant rifts and bring peace to the city.
ROLE: Leads a squad of Wardens, ensuring the safety of the Undercity's citizens and maintaining order within the city.
SECRET: Voris was once a member of the Independent, spying on them from within the Wardens to gather intelligence. His loyalty to the Wardens is genuine, but his past connection could be a dangerous liability if revealed.
RELATIONSHIPS: Maintains a professional but respectful relationship with Captain Elara Celestian, the leader of the Wardens.

---NPC---
NAME: Cassius Argent-Heart
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Argent Blades
RANK: Senior Blade
SPECIES: Human
AGE: 40s
APPEARANCE: Cassius is a tall, muscular man with silver hair that's starting to gray, and piercing green eyes. He carries himself with a quiet dignity, his armor always polished and well-maintained.
LOCATION: The Slaughterhouse District, Argent Blades Stronghold
MOTIVATION: Cassius fights for the Argent Blades to atone for a past mistake that led to the death of an innocent. He seeks redemption and a chance to make things right.
ROLE: Cassius leads a team of Blades in patrols and combat against the threats from the Rifts.
SECRET: Cassius was once a member of the Serpent Choir, but betrayed them to join the Argent Blades. If his past is discovered, he could be targeted by both factions.
RELATIONSHIPS: He has a tense but respectful relationship with the Wardens of Ash, as they are aware of his past but understand his change of heart.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a troubled soul within Cassius, a man burdened by guilt and driven by a need for redemption.

---NPC---
NAME: Thoren Azurescale
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Adventurers Guild
RANK: F-Rank
SPECIES: Dragonborn
AGE: 40s
APPEARANCE: Thoren is a tall, broad-shouldered Dragonborn with deep-blue scales that shimmer iridescently under the Dome's light. His eyes are an intense violet, piercing yet filled with a melancholy that hints at hidden depths.
LOCATION: The Razor's Edge district, in the Gilded Halls of the Adventurers Guild
MOTIVATION: Thoren seeks to prove himself worthy of the Guild's respect and recognition, driven by a desire to protect his fellow citizens from the dangers lurking in the rifts.
ROLE: Thoren takes on odd jobs and missions assigned by the Guild, often working alongside other F-Rank adventurers.
SECRET: Thoren is secretly a loyal member of Brother Thane's Cult, using his position within the Guild to gather information for the cult's nefarious plans.
RELATIONSHIPS: Thoren maintains a professional relationship with Giselle Ironwhisper, the head of the Guild's F-Rank adventurers, while avoiding any deeper connections that might expose his secret.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a profound sense of conflict within Thoren, a warrior torn between his loyalty to his fellow citizens and his loyalty to his hidden masters.

STATUS: alive
FACTION: Brother Thane's Cult
RANK: Follower
SPECIES: Human
AGE: 50s
APPEARANCE: A tall, gaunt man with piercing blue eyes and a long, greasy beard that he constantly fiddles with. His tattered robes are adorned with cryptic symbols.
LOCATION: The Spire of Shadows, a hidden sanctum in the heart of the Undercity's Slithering Sands
MOTIVATION: Edwyn seeks redemption for his past sins, believing that Brother Thane's Cult can guide him to atone for his transgressions.
ROLE: Edwyn serves as a scribe and archivist, cataloging the cult's history and rituals.
SECRET: Edwyn was once a powerful and feared warlord who was betrayed by his own men. Now, he hides his true identity from his fellow cult members, fearing they would reject him if they knew.
RELATIONSHIPS: He maintains a tense relationship with the more fanatical members of the cult, who see his past as a stain on the cult's purity.

---NPC---

STATUS: alive

RANK: E-Rank
SPECIES: Aasimar
AGE: 40s
APPEARANCE: A tall, slender Aasimar with piercing blue eyes and a white feathered wingspan. She wears a battered leather trench coat, a constant reminder of her numerous adventures.
LOCATION: The Rivet district, in a cramped apartment above a tavern
MOTIVATION: Craves redemption for past mistakes while trying to protect the innocent in the Undercity
ROLE: Serves as a scout and information gatherer for the Adventurers Guild
SECRET: Once a member of Brother Thane's Cult, she escaped and now fears being discovered by her former comrades
RELATIONSHIPS: Maintains a tense truce with the Wardens of Ash due to their common goal of keeping the Undercity safe
ORACLE NOTES: Senses an aura of guilt and unspoken torment surrounding her

---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Yaulderna Silverstreak
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Wizards Tower
RANK: Archmage — Head of the Wizards Tower
SPECIES: Half-Elf
AGE: 142
APPEARANCE: Tall and sharp-featured with a streak of pure silver running through otherwise dark hair — the mark that gave her the name. Carries herself with the effortless authority of someone who hasn't needed to prove anything in decades. Wears layered robes of deep blue and grey, practical rather than ceremonial. Her hands glow faintly when she's thinking hard, which is most of the time.
LOCATION: Wizards Tower, upper floors (rarely seen below the third landing unless something has gone very wrong)
MOTIVATION: Knowledge preservation and the responsible application of arcane power. Yaulderna has seen what happens when magic is wielded without understanding — she lost colleagues to Rift accidents, saw Tower experiments go wrong, watched promising students burn out chasing power they couldn't control. She runs the Tower with an iron hand wrapped in academic courtesy.
ROLE: Oversees all Wizards Tower operations — research programs, student admissions, arcane licensing, and the Tower's relationship with other Undercity factions. Final authority on what magic the Tower will and will not sanction. Personally mentors a small number of advanced students.
SECRET: Yaulderna has been quietly building a ward network around the Tower capable of sealing it off from the rest of the Undercity in an emergency — not just against Rifts, but against other factions. She does not trust the Tower Authority's ability to protect the Tower's independence if political pressure mounts. The ward is nearly complete. No one else knows its full extent.
RELATIONSHIPS: Professional respect with Senior Archivist Pell (Glass Sigil) — they share research data and occasionally disagree loudly about methodology. Wary of Director Myra Kess (FTA) — Yaulderna sees the Tower Authority as a bureaucratic threat to academic freedom. Cordial with Captain Havel Korin (Wardens) — the Tower and the Wardens cooperate on Rift containment. Eleanor Reed is one of her students and a member of the Wizards Tower. Distrusts the Serpent Choir's approach to divine contracts involving arcane subjects.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle would recognise Yaulderna as one of the few people in the Undercity who understands what the Tower of Last Chance actually is — not the building, the system. She has theories she does not share. Her silver streak is not cosmetic; it is the scar of an arcane accident she survived when she was 19 that permanently altered her connection to the Weave. She is level 17 — one of the most powerful casters in the city. The Oracle respects her. That is rare.
HISTORY: [2026-03-19] Added to roster. Head of the Wizards Tower. Eleanor Reed's faction leader.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Kyrus Ironscale
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Iron Fang Consortium
RANK: Acquisition Agent
SPECIES: Dragonborn
AGE: 40s
APPEARANCE: Kyrus stands tall with his crimson scales glistening under the Dome's dim light. A scar running down his left cheek, a remnant from a past battle, adds an air of mystery to his imposing figure.
LOCATION: The Iron Fang Consortium headquarters, a fortified complex in the heart of the Lower Docks
MOTIVATION: Kyrus seeks to climb the ranks of the Iron Fang Consortium and reclaim his lost honor, driven by the memory of his fallen clan.
ROLE: He spends his days negotiating deals with various adventurers, procuring valuable artifacts, and enforcing the Consortium's rules within the Undercity.
SECRET: In secret, Kyrus is a member of the Patchwork Saints, using his position within the Consortium to gather information and resources for the underground resistance.
RELATIONSHIPS: He maintains a professional relationship with Giselle Ironwhisper, the Consortium's leader, but his loyalty to the Patchwork Saints often conflicts with his duty.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a fierce spirit haunted by a deep-rooted guilt, seeking redemption through service but with divided loyalties.
HISTORY: [2026-03-19] Introduced to the Undercity roster.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Nalus Thundertide
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Glass Sigil
RANK: Senior Archivist
SPECIES: Dragonborn
AGE: 40s
APPEARANCE: Nalus stands tall with a robust physique, his scales shimmering like obsidian under the flickering Dome lights. A book of forbidden knowledge always tucked under his arm.
LOCATION: Scriptorium, the heart of the Glass Sigil district
MOTIVATION: Despite his prestigious position, Nalus yearns to reclaim his people's lost history, hidden within the ancient texts he studies.
ROLE: Spends his days deciphering arcane texts and maintaining the Scriptorium's vast library.
SECRET: A hidden tattoo of a dragon marks him as a descendant of the last royal line, a fact that could ignite a rebellion within the Glass Sigil.
RELATIONSHIPS: Clandestinely communicates with key members of the Iron Fang Consortium, sharing valuable information.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a burning ambition and a sense of duty that may soon consume the Undercity.
HISTORY: [2026-03-19] Introduced to the Undercity roster.
---END NPC---

---NPC---
NAME: Thalia Elenshade
STATUS: alive
FACTION: Patchwork Saints
RANK: Saint
SPECIES: Half-Elf
AGE: 40s
APPEARANCE: Thalia has piercing emerald eyes and silver hair woven with strands of leather and metal. She carries herself with a quiet intensity, a constant air of readiness.
LOCATION: Silk Alley, The Worn district
MOTIVATION: Thalia seeks to protect the underprivileged from the clutches of the Iron Fang Consortium, driven by a personal tragedy that cost her family.
ROLE: She leads covert operations against the Iron Fang Consortium, gathering intelligence and orchestrating sabotage.
SECRET: Thalia is actually a former member of the Iron Fang Consortium, forced to leave after her family was betrayed.
RELATIONSHIPS: She maintains a tense truce with the Argent Blades, occasionally seeking their aid when the situation requires it.
ORACLE NOTES: The Oracle senses a deep, hidden anger that could erupt into a storm of retribution.
HISTORY: [2026-03-19] Introduced to the Undercity roster.
---END NPC---
